title: prunus mutabilis f. praecox
intro: Prunus mutabilis f. praecox, also known as the Chinese flowering crabapple, is a deciduous shrub or small tree belonging to the Prunus genus. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and alleviating coughs, as well as supporting digestive and respiratory health. In herbal preparations, the bark and leaves of Prunus mutabilis f. praecox can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures.
